gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved with no blocking findings and confirmed the default chunk id plus README request example match planner behavior.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 66 passed
what_changed: Added `SourceDocument.from_text(...)` for single-document, single-chunk cache generation inputs.
Documented the one-text workflow path in the README Workflow API example with a matching `DocumentKVRequest`.
Added workflow and governance tests for the new helper and documentation example.
why: Cachet should provide an intuitive API for arbitrary textual documents, not only lower-level chunk maps. A one-call text constructor makes the common path easier while keeping the existing chunked API intact.
